title: Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
summary: Gemini 3.5 Flash integrates into CodeMender, allowing it to identify and patch vulnerabilities. Google is launching Gemini 3.6 Flash alongside a new security model dedicated to quickly finding and patching security vulnerabilities.
